title: DawnSky Word Card
description: Content schema for a single vocabulary info card. All sections optional except hero fields and examples.

pinyin.description: Pinyin with tone marks (e.g. xīn, not xin1)

meaning_en.description: English meaning(s). Omit if not useful.

characters.description: Character-by-character breakdown. Omit for single-character words.

radicals.description: Key radicals/components with mnemonics. Omit if nothing interesting to say.

note.description: Mnemonic or structural note. Keep warm and concise. Reference learner's known words when possible.

deep_dive.description:
HTML prose explaining etymology, feel, nuance. Use

tags and for emphasis. 2-4 short paragraphs.

title.description: Short label with soft emoji (e.g. '✦ Покупка', '☁ Примирение')

examples.description: Example sentences. 2-5 items. Prefer vocabulary the learner already knows.

cn.description: Chinese sentence. Wrap target word in {hl}...{/hl} markers.

note.description: Brief note about new/key words in the sentence (e.g. '走 (zǒu) — уходить')

footer_note.description: One-line note: frequency, HSK level, fun fact. (e.g. '新 — одно из первых прилагательных · HSK 1')
